ddls:
CREATE TABLE "samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample */,
  "sample_name" TEXT /* Name of the sample */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Gene associated with the mutation */,
  "transcript" TEXT /* Transcript identifier for the gene */,
  "tier" INTEGER /* Tier number indicating significance */,
  "census_gene" TEXT /* Indicates if it matches a census gene */,
  "drug_name" TEXT /* Drug name associated with the mutation */,
  "legacy_mutation_id" TEXT /* Legacy mutation identifier */,
  "genomic_mutation_id" TEXT /* Genomic mutation identifier */,
  "mutation_id" INTEGER /* Unique mutation identifier */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the patient associated with the sample */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample was collected */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the data to track changes */,
  "study_id" TEXT /* Foreign key to link to the studies table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_mutation_id FOREIGN KEY ("mutation_id") REFERENCES mutations ("mutation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mutations" (
  "mutation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mutation */,
  "aa_mutation" TEXT /* Amino acid mutation description */,
  "cds_mutation" TEXT /* CDS mutation description */,
  "primary_tissue" TEXT /* Primary tissue type where the sample was collected */,
  "tissue_subtype_1" TEXT /* First subtype of the tissue */,
  "tissue_subtype_2" TEXT /* Second subtype of the tissue */,
  "mutation_type" TEXT /* Type of mutation (e.g., missense, nonsense) */,
  "pathogenicity" TEXT /* Pathogenicity status (e.g., benign, pathogenic) */,
  "functional_impact" TEXT /* Impact on gene function */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mutation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "histologies" (
  "histology_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each histology entry */,
  "histology" TEXT /* Main histology type */,
  "histology_subtype_1" TEXT /* First subtype of the histology */,
  "histology_subtype_2" TEXT /* Second subtype of the histology */,
  "WHO_classification" TEXT /* WHO classification of the histology */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("histology_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pubmed_references" (
  "pubmed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each PubMed reference */,
  "study_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the study associated with the reference */,
  "author_list" TEXT /* List of authors for the PubMed reference */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pubmed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pubmed_references_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name or description of the study */,
  "somatic_status" TEXT /* Somatic status of the sample */,
  "sample_type" TEXT /* Type of sample (e.g., Tumour Sample) */,
  "zygosity" TEXT /* Zygosity information for the sample */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution conducting the study */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genomic_coordinates" (
  "coordinates_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genomic coordinates entry */,
  "mutation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the mutation */,
  "genome_coordinates" TEXT /* Genomic coordinates in GRCh38 format */,
  "hgvsp" TEXT /* HGVSp format for the mutation */,
  "hgvsc" TEXT /* HGVSc format for the mutation */,
  "hvgsg" TEXT /* HGVG format for the mutation */,
  "reference_genome" TEXT /* Reference genome version (e.g., GRCh38) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coordinates_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genomic_coordinates_mutation_id FOREIGN KEY ("mutation_id") REFERENCES mutations ("mutation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, clinician, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the user is affiliated with */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the sample */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clinical_trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clinical trial */,
  "trial_name" TEXT /* Name of the clinical trial */,
  "drug_name" TEXT /* Drug used in the trial */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the trial (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the trial */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the trial */,
  "phase" TEXT /* Phase of the clinical trial (e.g., Phase I, Phase II) */,
  "sponsor" TEXT /* Sponsor of the clinical trial */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clinical_trials_drug_name FOREIGN KEY ("drug_name") REFERENCES samples ("drug_name")
)
